title: More Proffessions
description: Adds 6 new villager professions to your world with this datapack! Craft the new job blocks and place them down for the Villagers to provide new trades to you!
body:
## 📖 Description

More Proffessions adds new villagers to minecraft that have whole new trades. From the alchemist to the explorer, this data pack builds whole new Villager interactions that can help ease the amount of griding for for resources that should be accessible to all players.

## ⭐ Features

- Adds 6 new villagers to minecraft, the alchemist, archeologist, botanist, enginner, explorer and miner!
- Each Villager sells different and less accessible items that are often grindy to gain access too, or are just plain complicated.
- Every villager also comes with a different workstation for each type, which is crafted with an emerald and a specific block.
- New Advancements to help understand how to progress through this new system!

## 🎓 Trades (Spoilers for each villager's trades)
